decisions.decision: Execute sequentially on the main tree with worktrees OFF
decisions.rationale: 75-04 modifies the SIBLING nono-ts repo (../nono-ts, NOT a submodule) — Claude Code worktree isolation would break the ../nono-ts relative path and the commit protocol; plus known Windows worktree file-lock/CWD fragility; plus security-critical code
that is the active bindings dev branch (same one nono-py uses), not main

decisions.decision: nono pin in nono-ts is a PATH dep { path = "../Nono/crates/nono", version = "0.62" }
decisions.rationale: crates.io nono 0.62.0 fails to build on Windows (Unix MetadataExt not cfg-gated); matches nono-py's local-path approach; version constraint 0.62 preserved

decisions.decision: Cross-target clippy (Linux+macOS) recorded as PARTIAL for all touched cfg-gated code
decisions.rationale: Win11 dev host cannot cross-compile (ring/aws-lc C toolchain absent); deferred to CI per cross-target-verify-checklist.md

decisions.decision: D-03 locked YES — demote also cuts the per-agent WFP filter (75-02)
decisions.rationale: leaving egress open after IL-drop is a security regression; WFP-cut failure on demote is non-fatal

context_notes: Wave 1 (75-01, 75-03, 75-04) is complete, committed, and integration-build-clean (nono-cli builds; nono-ts exports confirmed). I was mid-dispatch of the 75-02 executor (prompt fully prepared) when the user paused. 75-02 is self-contained: ControlRequest::Demote + handle_demote (OpenProcessToken + SetTokenInformation(TokenIntegrityLevel, Low)) + nono agent demote CLI verb. Critical: handle_demote MUST call wfp_filter_remove (pub(crate) at crates/nono-cli/src/agent_daemon/launch.rs:265) for the D-03 WFP-cut, and MUST document the spike-002 leak limits in both the doc comment and CLI help. Demote targets a daemon tenant_id only (D-02), does NOT reap (D-03), unknown tenant_id -> clear error. Do NOT weaken the Medium-IL control-pipe SDDL (prevents Low-IL self-demote).
